//: Single source of truth for the pinned external Pulumi language-runtime versions. Renovate updates this file; `make generate-versions` regenerates the derived file pkg/util/known_runtimes_gen.go, and `make renovate` writes a changelog entry per bump. For each runtime, `repo` is the GitHub owner/repo (also the renovate depName) and `version` is the release tag. Consumers: scripts/get-language-providers.sh (bundled) and pkg/util/plugin.go (unbundled).
